SEARCH
Package com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine

Class GameEngine

java.lang.Object
com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine.GameEngine
public class GameEngine extends Object
Game engine for High Low Jack scoring and validation.

Provides static methods for calculating scores based on the four point categories:

  • High: Highest trump card in play (1 point)
  • Low: Lowest trump card in play (1 point)
  • Jack: Capturing the Jack of trumps, if in play (1 point)
  • Game: Most game points from captured cards (1 point)

Card point values for "Game" calculation:

  • Ace = 4 points
  • King = 3 points
  • Queen = 2 points
  • Jack = 1 point
  • Ten = 10 points
  • All other cards = 0 points
Version:
1.0
Author:
Dale & Primus

  • Constructor Details

    • GameEngine

      public GameEngine()

  • Method Details

    • calculateScores

      public static Map<String,String> calculateScores(Game game)
      Calculates and awards scores for a completed round. Awards points for High, Low, Jack, and Game to the appropriate players.
      Parameters:
      game - the completed game (must be in ROUND_COMPLETE state)
      Returns:
      map of point categories to winning players
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if round is not complete
      IllegalArgumentException - if game is null

    • findHighTrump

      public static String findHighTrump(List<Trick> tricks, Card.Suit trump)
      Finds the player who was dealt the highest trump card. Searches all tricks for trump cards and returns the player who played the highest.
      Parameters:
      tricks - list of completed tricks
      trump - the trump suit
      Returns:
      name of player with highest trump, or null if no trumps played

    • findLowTrump

      public static String findLowTrump(List<Trick> tricks, Card.Suit trump)
      Finds the player who was dealt the lowest trump card. Searches all tricks for trump cards and returns the player who played the lowest.
      Parameters:
      tricks - list of completed tricks
      trump - the trump suit
      Returns:
      name of player with lowest trump, or null if no trumps played

    • findJackWinner

      public static String findJackWinner(List<Trick> tricks, Card.Suit trump)
      Finds the player who captured the Jack of trumps. Returns the winner of the trick containing the Jack of the trump suit.
      Parameters:
      tricks - list of completed tricks
      trump - the trump suit
      Returns:
      name of player who won the trick with Jack of trumps, or null if not in play

    • findGameWinner

      public static String findGameWinner(List<Trick> tricks)
      Finds the player who won the most game points from captured cards.

      Game points are awarded as follows:

      • Ace = 4 points
      • King = 3 points
      • Queen = 2 points
      • Jack = 1 point
      • Ten = 10 points
      Parameters:
      tricks - list of completed tricks
      Returns:
      name of player with most game points, or null on tie

    • getGamePoints

      public static int getGamePoints(Card card)
      Returns the game point value for a card.
      Parameters:
      card - the card to evaluate
      Returns:
      game points (0-10)

    • isValidPlay

      public static boolean isValidPlay(Game game, String playerName, Card card)
      Validates whether a card play is legal according to High Low Jack rules.

      Rules:

      • Player must have the card in their hand
      • If not leading, must follow suit if possible
      • If cannot follow suit, any card may be played
      Parameters:
      game - the current game
      playerName - the player attempting to play
      card - the card being played
      Returns:
      true if the play is legal
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if game, playerName, or card is null
